payload.text: Cải thiện chế độ tối ưu là trong một bài \begin{ex} ... \end{ex} thì sẽ không có khoản trống, sau mỗi bài thì sẽ có 01 khoảng trống đẻ biết. Sửa lỗi nút Xóa: Nút "XÓA TẤT CẢ" giờ đây sẽ xóa sạch dữ liệu ở cả hai cột (Gốc và Kết quả) đúng như bạn yêu cầu. Trải nghiệm người dùng: Thêm bộ lọc hiển thị trạng thái xử lý mượt mà và khả năng sao chép kết quả nhanh chóng.

**Initiating the Rewrite**

I'm focusing now on rewriting the LaTeX content. The aim is to convert `.tex` files into more accessible formats like plain text or Markdown. This initial stage is all about data transformation, and figuring out the conversion logic. The current scope is centered around parsing, extracting, and then translating the TeX syntax.


**Refining User Experience**

I'm now integrating AI via the Gemini API to enhance readability, as requested. The local `latexService.ts` will be updated to orchestrate calls to `geminiService.ts`. I also need to refine the layout and add status displays and copy functions. The "Clear All" button's function is now corrected to clear input and output areas. I'm focusing on ensuring zero extra whitespace in `ex` blocks and one line between them.


**Integrating Gemini's Power**

I'm now deeply involved in integrating the Gemini API to provide a text rewriting capability, and building the "Viết lại" feature in `App.tsx`. The new "XÓA TẤT CẢ" button is implemented to clear both input and output. I'm also ensuring the UI clearly displays the new functional features, with a focus on delivering a seamless user experience. I'm working on the `latexService.ts` to implement the "Tối ưu" logic, focusing on splitting blocks, trimming, and joining lines to eliminate internal spaces within `\begin{ex}` blocks, as well as ensure one empty line between blocks.


**Implementing Spacing Optimization**

I'm now refining the `latexService.ts` to implement the `OPTIMIZE_SPACING` action as requested. I'm focusing on cleaning up the spaces within `\begin{ex}` blocks and ensuring a single empty line between them. Also, the "XÓA TẤT CẢ" button is now correctly clearing both the input and output areas in the UI. I'm modifying `App.tsx` accordingly, and ready to use Gemini for the "Viết lại" feature.


**Coding the Rewrite Feature**

I'm now fully immersed in coding the "AI Rewrite" feature, and have implemented a new button and structure in `App.tsx`. I've added distinct areas for raw and processed text, with the necessary buttons at the bottom. I'm focusing on ensuring the "CLEAR ALL" button functions as intended. The aim now is to connect the logic to the Gemini API, leveraging the structure I've set up, to enable the AI text rewriting functionality.

entries.description: Cập nhật logic tối ưu hóa: xóa bỏ dòng trống thừa bên trong môi trường \begin{ex}...\end{ex} và đảm bảo có đúng 1 dòng trống giữa các bài.
Tích hợp Gemini API để "Viết lại" nội dung sang văn bản thuần túy, thêm nút "XÓA TẤT CẢ" để xóa sạch cả hai cột, và cải thiện giao diện người dùng.

payload.text:

entries.description: Fix __dirname error in ESM by importing fileURLToPath from url and defining __dirname manually. Also updated API key definition to be more robust for Gemini API usage.
Upgrade Gemini model to gemini-3-pro-preview for complex LaTeX and math reasoning tasks as per guidelines, and ensure proper use of the .text property.
